header.topbarLabel: Accredited laboratory No. 1599 · ČSN EN ISO/IEC 17025

home.metaDescription: Accredited emission and workplace measurements, dispersion and noise studies, EIA, expert reports, operating rules, IPPC, ISPOP and GHG — for operators, investors and the public sector.
home.heroTitle: Accredited measurements, studies and documentation for authorities
home.heroLead: We take care of everything your operation needs — for operators, investors and designers, without having to source multiple suppliers.

contact.metaDescription: Send us a brief description or attachments from the authority. We will review the situation and propose the next steps — form or direct contact.
contact.title: Get in touch — we are happy to help
contact.lead: A short description or an attachment from the authority is enough. We will assess the situation and get back to you with next steps.
